subcodes.first_line: O ye friends who long for the Beauty of God! When the self-subsistent living God manifested Himself...The Divine Minstrel held the stringed instrument in His Hand, and preluded a melody and tune
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران حقیقی و مشتاقان جمال الهی چون حی قیوم بجمیع اسما و صفات و کمالات و
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @spiritual transformation, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih]
